reason: The item cleanly targets boundary-aware evaluation of three linked claims (onset-temperature invariance, condition-specific POF3 amplification, and a residual-VC venting mechanism near 130°C), with required thresholds/mechanisms explicitly constrainable in a short answer. Decoy risk is limited here because it is not an MCQ, and some ambiguity could arise from how strictly graders interpret “supported/unsupported/contradicted” for multi-part mechanisms, but overall it should separate experts who respect condition-specificity from those who overgeneralize VC effects.
